message.content:
@startuml
title Skava Integration - Order Replaced Completed

participant "Skava AWS" as SkavaAWS {
    participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SkavaEventOrchestration
}

participant "Kafka" as Kafka {
    participant "Topics" as Topics
}

participant "YL Services" as YLServices {
    participant "Order Sync Service" as OrderSyncService
}

participant "Legacy DB" as LegacyDB

SkavaEventOrchestration -> Topics: 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate Topics
note right of Topics: Async
deactivate Topics

Topics -> OrderSyncService: 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate OrderSyncService
OrderSyncService -> LegacyDB: 3 Update order status in legacy db
activate LegacyDB
LegacyDB --> OrderSyncService: 4 Response/Order ID
deactivate LegacyDB

OrderSyncService -> Topics: 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
activate Topics
note right of Topics: Async
deactivate Topics

Topics -> SkavaEventOrchestration: 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
activate SkavaEventOrchestration
deactivate SkavaEventOrchestration

@enduml
